headline: Claude agentic loops gain traction for specialized healthcare workflows
body: Developers are rapidly experimenting with Claude-based agentic architectures, including code generation loops paired with cost-optimized models like DeepSeek V4 Pro. Healthcare organizations should track this momentum because these patterns directly address EHR integration challenges and clinical documentation automation. Agentic systems that handle multi-step reasoning could accelerate value-based care workflows by automating chart review, prior authorization logic, and clinical coding without requiring custom vendor solutions. The emerging tooling landscape suggests lower barriers to deploying AI agents for specific healthcare tasks, shifting decisions from monolithic vendor platforms to composable, in-house implementations. This represents a meaningful shift in how health systems might approach AI infrastructure and talent requirements.
